title: Argentinian-Style Skillet Vegetables
description: A flavorful and colorful vegetarian recipe inspired by Argentine cuisine, featuring a skillet of sautéed vegetables.

ingredients.name: Zucchini
ingredients.notes: Can substitute with other summer squash.

ingredients.name: Tomato
ingredients.notes: Cherry or grape tomatoes work too.

ingredients.name: Skillet
ingredients.notes: Any cast-iron or stainless steel skillet is suitable.

ingredients.name: Olive oil
ingredients.notes: Use a high-quality oil for best flavor.

instructions: Heat the skillet over medium-high heat.
Add olive oil and swirl to coat the pan.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the sliced red bell pepper and cook for 3-4 minutes.
Add the sliced yellow onion and cook until translucent.
Add the sliced zucchini and cook for 3-4 minutes.
Add the cherry tomatoes and cook until they start to release their juices.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
